mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tax_classification WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY fee_type
SELECT * FROM tax_classification WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1
SELECT * FROM tax_classification WHERE tax_code = #{taxCode} AND status = 1
SELECT * FROM tax_classification WHERE fee_type = #{feeType} AND status = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tax_classification (tax_code, tax_name, fee_type, tax_rate, status) VALUES (#{taxCode}, #{taxName}, #{feeType}, #{taxRate}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE tax_classification SET tax_code = #{taxCode}, tax_name = #{taxName}, fee_type = #{feeType}, tax_rate = #{taxRate}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
